summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FrenchQuest language learning platform. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend core features working, but authentication session persistence issues identified.

integration_issues.issue: User sessions expire or are lost when navigating between protected pages, causing redirects to login page

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
Dashboard displays after login with XP, streak, level stats
Games hub page loads with 6 interactive games
Backend API /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
Backend API /api/tutor/chat works with AI responses
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session persistence issue - users are being redirected to login when navigating between protected pages. Check JWT token expiration, cookie settings, and AuthContext state management.
